## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 90+ articles developed, 20 to be published this week, 10 more by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Significant growth in impressions (100% increase) and clicks (20% increase) observed in the past two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Focus shifting to core metrics: analyzing which blogs generate leads, improving keyword rankings for "shoppable video"](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Action items: improve indexing for new locales (French/Spanish), continue industry-specific content (grocery, home improvement)](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [90+ articles developed; 20 to be published this week, 10 more by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Catching up on backlog: 30 articles to be published by next Thursday](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [New column to be added in reporting: number of articles published per month](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [April: 8,000 clicks, \~1.3 million impressions, 32 leads](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [May (first 6 days): 1,500 clicks, 600k impressions, 9 leads](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [100% growth in impressions over the last two weeks (for both new and existing articles)](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [First time hitting 2,200 clicks in a week (1,800 from GrowthX, 300 from existing articles)](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [Clicks increased by 20%, but not proportional to 100% impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### SEO Strategy

  - [Focus on improving "shoppable video" keyword ranking in the US (currently not in top 20)](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Audit needed to strategize moving ranking to top 3-5 positions](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [New locales launched: French and Spanish](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Technical improvements needed:](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
    1.  Add language section for internal linking between versions
    2.  Create and submit sitemaps for French and Spanish versions

### Website Migration Challenges

  - [Current setup: WordPress as primary site, Webflow pages served through Nginx rules](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [Sitemap strategy complicated due to potential duplicate sitemaps (WordPress and Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Complete migration to Webflow needed for robust sitemap strategy](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

### Industry-Specific Content Focus

  - [25 articles on fashion, 20 on footwear (to be live this week)](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Next focus: Combination of grocery and home improvement (e.g., Lowe's, Home Depot)](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [Consumer electronics as a potential additional focus](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Connect with Cameron to discuss sitemap strategy and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Prepare and send 15-20 topics for grocery and home improvement industries](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Include full funnel analysis (impressions, clicks, leads) for specific articles in next week's report](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Add a dedicated "leads journey" section to the reporting](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Conduct "shoppable video" keyword ranking audit and propose improvement strategies](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Work on technical improvements for new locales (French/Spanish) indexing](https://fathom.video/share/kQGac8Sz6ueLFj73-37beKxsy7Dwnccf?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
